title: SovereignIdentity
description: A sovereign identity record for any entity type: individual, organization, agent, robot, or system.

id.description: A globally unique, persistent identifier for this entity. Recommended: W3C DID (e.g., 'did:example:123') or URN.

entityType.description: The class of sovereign entity this identity represents.

displayName.description: A human-readable name for this entity. May be a pseudonym or role name.

controller.description: The identifier of the entity that controls this identity record. For individuals, this is typically the same as 'id'. For agents, this is the principal's identifier.

verificationMethods.description: Cryptographic or other methods that can be used to verify claims made by this identity.

id.description: Unique identifier for this verification method, typically a fragment of the entity's DID.

controller.description: The identifier of the entity that controls this key.

publicKeyMultibase.description: The public key encoded in multibase format (if applicable).

attributes.description: Disclosed identity attributes. Only include what the entity has chosen to share. Each attribute should carry a disclosure policy.

principalChain.description: For agents and robots: the chain of principals that authorized this entity, from root sovereign to immediate delegator.

items.description: Identifier of a principal in the chain.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this identity record was created.

updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this identity record was last updated.
